chunks.text: Fung Institute for Engineering celebrates 5th year anniversary - EECS at Berkeley The Coleman Fung Institute for Engineering celebrated its fifth year anniversary with reflections on how far the institute has grown. Launched in January of 2010, the institute is the hub connecting engineering disciplines with management, data, and social sciences, transforming engineers and scientists into leaders who can take risks and develop technical, social, and economic innovations. The Fung Institute administers the Master of Engineering program. Categories Education Research View Open Faculty Positions
